sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104967" key="tri/ippon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρί-ιππον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n104967.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">triga,</tr_> ibid.; also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τριίππιν</orth> (i. e. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ιον</foreign>), ib.</sense> </entryFree>
